products.name: VoiceToWebsite Builder
products.summary: Generate a website preview from a prompt, inspect it, and buy the source pack.
products.idealFor: Founders, agencies, and fast-turn launch work
products.outcome: A low-friction productized offer that converts interest into a paid source bundle.

products.name: Local Leads Launchpad
products.summary: A source-ready lead generation site system for service businesses.
products.idealFor: Home services, clinics, legal, and local operators
products.outcome: Sell a higher-demand website package tied to direct call and quote capture.

products.name: Bookings Engine
products.summary: A booking-focused website pack for appointment and session businesses.
products.idealFor: Consultants, studios, clinics, and paid-session businesses
products.outcome: Turn a premium appointment funnel into a repeatable app-store offer.

products.name: Creator Course Kit
products.summary: A digital-product sales page system for creators and educators.
products.idealFor: Creators, coaches, course sellers, and membership offers
products.outcome: Ship a better digital-product storefront without starting from a blank page.

products.name: Starter
products.summary: Entry subscription for voice-driven website generation.
products.outcome: Launch quickly with a lower monthly commitment.

products.name: Pro
products.summary: Primary growth subscription with stronger throughput and support.
products.idealFor: Small teams shipping customer-facing websites weekly
products.outcome: Faster output, richer generation control, and conversion tuning.

products.name: Operator OS
products.summary: The recurring software offer for teams that want an AI-managed system for execution, automation, and release workflows.
products.idealFor: Founders, small teams, and technical operators
products.outcome: Create subscription revenue from a product that helps work actually get shipped.

products.name: Launch Sprint
products.summary: A done-with-you implementation package that sets up messaging, pages, workflows, and the first operating system for delivery.
products.idealFor: Buyers who want speed over self-setup
products.outcome: Generate service revenue while increasing product adoption and customer success.

products.name: Enterprise Deployment
products.summary: A high-trust self-hosted and customization path for organizations that need governance, control, and rollout support.
products.idealFor: Internal platform teams and compliance-sensitive buyers
products.outcome: Create larger contracts with lower churn and deeper integration.
